posts.author: Balaji1974
posts.community: NRB Bearings - EV and exports to drive growth?
posts.text: Yes. The management is very very conservative, guiding to a turnover of 2500 cr in the next 5 years, which works out to be 13.5% cagr.

posts.author: gaurav
posts.community: NRB Bearings - EV and exports to drive growth?
posts.text: Pledge is almost gone only ~12% remaining. Promoter pared with significant chunk of stake (~4.5%) but good thing is strong hands absorbed it. Surprisingly, they have started building narrative by including buzzwords like aerospace, data center and make in usa. Take it with pinch of salt. I am wondering if current price is good to average up or not. Happy to hear opinions. 108adab8-3a18-4349-909f-5439844f58a9.pdf (665.3 KB)
